summary: LockBit detonation on prod payroll DB (2025-11): auto-isolate + restore from snapshot approved by tier-3 analyst; contained in 6 min. Confirmed true positive.
Ransomware behaviour on staging mirror (2026-02): escalated to IR on-call; staging is a prod replica so treated as high-blast-radius.
Prod data-lake exfil (2026-01): 180GB egress, escalated, IAM role rotated, egress blocked. Confirmed compromised analytics role.
Cobalt Strike beacon on prod jumpbox (2025-09): auto-isolate approved, host reimaged. True positive lateral-movement staging.
Impossible-travel on staging SSO (2026-03): analyst confirmed corporate VPN egress hop, marked benign. False positive from geo feed.
Process injection on staging API (2025-12): manual review confirmed malicious DLL, contained. Required human triage — ambiguous EDR signal.
Nmap scan against dev host (recurring): authorised internal scanner. Auto-dismissed, no action. Known-good source subnet.
PUP toolbar on dev laptop (recurring): low-grade adware, dismissed and cleaned by endpoint policy. No incident.
MFA fatigue against dev VPN (2026-04): user accidentally triggered pushes, no compromise. Dismissed after quick check.
